allow: PowerShell($img = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\jonny\\Desktop\\kremmen place\\360' | Select-Object -First 1; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bitmap = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($img.FullName\); "$\($img.Name\) — $\($bitmap.Width\)x$\($bitmap.Height\)"; $bitmap.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\jonny\\Desktop\\kremmen place\\360' | Select-Object -First 6 | ForEach-Object { $b = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($_.FullName\); "$\($_.Name\)`t$\($b.Width\)x$\($b.Height\)`tratio=$\([math]::Round\($b.Width/$b.Height,3\)\)"; $b.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell($exif = & "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -Command "\(Get-ItemProperty 'C:\\Users\\jonny\\Desktop\\kremmen place\\360\\IMG_20260430_190347_00_628.jpg'\).VersionInfo"; $shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $folder = $shell.Namespace\('C:\\Users\\jonny\\Desktop\\kremmen place\\360'\); $file = $folder.ParseName\('IMG_20260430_190347_00_628.jpg'\); 0..50 | ForEach-Object { $name = $folder.GetDetailsOf\($folder.Items, $_\); $val = $folder.GetDetailsOf\($file, $_\); if \($val\) { "$_ : $name = $val" } })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $files = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\jonny\\Desktop\\kremmen place\\360' -File; "Total files: $\($files.Count\)"; ""; $files | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $b = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($_.FullName\); "$\($_.Name\)`t$\($b.Width\)x$\($b.Height\)`tratio=$\([math]::Round\($b.Width/$b.Height,3\)\)`t$\([math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)\)MB"; $b.Dispose\(\) })
